themes.name: Groww Platform Reliability Issues
quotes: 'So if you love your money, keep it away from groww'
'App lags almost 100% of the time during live trades, and the data is often inaccurate.'
themes.description: Users are complaining about Groww's platform unreliability, poor performance, and technical issues which are affecting their trading experience. The issues are diverse but include inaccurate data, delayed transactions, app lags and freezes, and unresponsive customer support. This has led to significant financial losses for some users, damage to their trust in the platform, and a negative overall experience.
themes.business_impact: High risk of customer churn, reputational damage, and loss of market share due to the platform's reliability and performance issues.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Groww's platform reliability issues are likely caused by a combination of factors, including inadequate infrastructure, insufficient testing, poor code quality, and inadequate monitoring and feedback mechanisms.
themes.action_plan: • Conduct a thorough root cause analysis to identify the underlying technical issues, develop a comprehensive fix plan, invest in infrastructure scaling, enhance testing and QA processes, and improve feedback mechanisms to address user concerns in a timely manner.

themes.name: Poor User Experience and Financial Losses
quotes: I lost around 35 -40 Lakh rupees in total trading F&O. I completely became obsessed with this but no matter what I take if I pick call and wait it goes put if I wait for put it goes call.
It happened multiple times that a position in loss was exited instead of the one in profit. Like, how is it possible when I open position A to exit, how can you exit from B or C?
themes.description: Users report frequent app crashes, slow navigation, and manipulation of sell orders, leading to significant financial losses. The app often fails to load data, and the customer support is inadequate, with unresponsive agents and unhelpful responses.
themes.business_impact: High churn risk due to poor user experience and significant financial losses, ultimately resulting in a loss of trust and damage to the company's reputation.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The app's poor performance is likely due to underlying technical issues, inadequate testing, and insufficient investment in customer support, leading to a lack of confidence among users.
themes.action_plan: • Investigate and resolve underlying technical issues, conduct thorough testing to ensure app stability and functionality, and revamp customer support to provide timely, helpful, and empathetic responses to user concerns. Improve communication with users, and provide clear information about the app's performance and potential risks.

themes.name: Stocks and Indices Layout Issues
quotes: The Nifty 50 and Sensex tickers are pushed into the status bar and cut off by the notch, making it impossible to read key indices at a glance.
Please Give a old update for grow app interface to see nifty and sensex and bank nifty please we are missing it
nifty and sensex tab made smaller. difficult to click tab
the new app design is really a downgrade from previous one. when I open app I don't just want to see numbers about current market trend I want to see it by percentage as well.
all are good but there is one thing missing that is layout...
themes.description: Users are unable to easily view market indices (Nifty 50, Sensex, etc.) due to layout changes in the latest app update, which have resulted in reduced visibility, difficulty in comparing values, and overall poor user experience. They are requesting the old layout to be restored for better clarity and intuitiveness.
themes.business_impact: High churn risk due to poor user experience, UX friction from increased effort required to access information
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: The root cause of this issue is a lack of adequate testing and design consideration for the Stocks and Indices layout in the latest app update.
themes.action_plan: • Restore the previous layout for Stocks and Indices, conduct thorough testing to ensure bug-free and user-friendly interface, engage UX Design team for input and review.
